title: PROD aggregation gives wrong result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t4 (a1 INT, prob FLOAT);
CREATE TABLE t5 (a1 INT, prob DECIMAL(5,2));
SELECT tmp.a1, SUM(tmp.prob) AS prob FROM (SELECT t4.a1 AS a1, t4.prob * t5.prob AS prob FROM t4 JOIN t5 ON t4.a1 = t5.a1) AS tmp GROUP BY tmp.a1;
key_bug_features: Incorrect aggregation with mixed data types in calculations
